note: Overworld enemy markers — painterly game sprites on solid black bg, supersampled 128x128 then drawn at TILE in-game. Short punchy prompts; flux does better with less.

sprites.name: rust_scrapper_ow
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a hunched rusty raider in scrap-metal armor and goggles, jagged weapon raised mid-swing, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, rust and dirt palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: drone_sentinel_ow
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a hovering quad-rotor surveillance drone with a glowing red optic eye, dark chrome body with red accents, rotors spinning, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: mutant_hound_ow
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a four-legged mutant hound, patchy dark fur, exposed magenta muscle, jagged spine ridge, glowing cyan eyes, mid-lunge pounce stance, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: gravbot_ow
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a heavy bipedal combat bot, thick armored shoulders, cyan powercore glowing in the chest, slate plating with yellow warning stripes, planted combat stance, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette

sprites.name: neon_cultist_ow
sprites.prompt: painterly game sprite of a hooded cultist in a pink-magenta robe with cyan glyphs on the hem, ritual blade raised for a strike, 3/4 overhead Zelda-style camera angle, magenta and cyan palette, pure solid black background, crisp silhouette
